state.draft:
Subject: Regarding Your Phone Issue

Dear [Customer Name],

I'm sorry to hear your phone has broken. I understand how inconvenient this must be.

To help us investigate and find the best solution for you, please reply with details about your phone (model, purchase date) and what happened. If you have an order number, please include that too.

We're ready to assist you further once we have this information.

Sincerely,
[Your Name/Company Support Team]

parts.text:
Subject: Regarding Your Phone Issue - How We Can Help

Dear Customer,

We're very sorry to hear that your phone has broken. We understand how frustrating and disruptive this can be.

To help us understand what happened and assist you as quickly and efficiently as possible, could you please provide a few more details?

Please tell us:
*   **What is the make and model of your phone?** (e.g., iPhone 13, Samsung Galaxy S22)
*   **When did the phone break, and what happened?** (e.g., dropped it, it got wet, stopped turning on suddenly, screen went blank, etc.)
*   **When and where was the phone purchased?** (This helps us determine warranty status.)
*   **Have you already tried any troubleshooting steps?** (e.g., restarting, charging, etc.)

Once we have this information, we can guide you through the appropriate next steps, which may include troubleshooting, repair options, or warranty claims.

Please reply to this email with the requested details, or if you prefer to speak with someone directly, you can call our support team at [Your Company Phone Number] during our business hours [Business Hours, e.g., Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 5 PM EST].

We're here to help get your phone back up and running as quickly as possible.

Thank you for your patience.

Sincerely,

The [Your Company Name] Support Team

parts.text:
Subject: Your Phone Issue - How We Can Help

Dear Customer,

We're sorry to hear your phone has broken. To help us assist you quickly, please provide the following details:

*   **Make and model of your phone?** (e.g., iPhone 13, Samsung Galaxy S22)
*   **When and how did it break?** (e.g., dropped, got wet, stopped turning on)
*   **When and where was it purchased?** (This helps with warranty)
*   **Have you tried any troubleshooting steps?** (e.g., restarting, charging)

Once we have this information, we can guide you through the appropriate next steps.

Please reply to this email with the requested details, or call our support team at [Your Company Phone Number] during [Business Hours] if you prefer to speak directly.

We look forward to helping you.

Sincerely,
